name: OpenClaw Security Advisor
description: Run a security checkup of your OpenClaw instance and get an expert analysis report from KiloCode.

authToken.description: KiloCode auth token. Set automatically via device auth on first use — stored as a SecretRef.

apiBaseUrl.description: KiloCode API base URL. Defaults to https://api.kilo.ai. Override for dev or self-hosted environments.
